Moderation.title: Review Moderation
Moderation.buildingQueueDescription: We are checking all locations for pending reviews.
Moderation.cachingActive: Caching system active to prevent rate-limiting
Moderation.allLocationsChecked: All {count} locations have been checked for pending reviews.
Moderation.queueBuilt: Queue built from {count} locations. {checked} locations with pending reviews have been checked.
Moderation.allCaughtUpDescription: There are currently no reviews requiring moderation in the selected platforms.
Moderation.checkLocationsWithoutPending: Also check locations without pending counter
Moderation.noTextFoundDescription: The reviewer only gave a score or the text fields are unknown. Use the 'Code' icon to inspect raw data.
Moderation.noProofDescription: This review has no attached proof of purchase.
Moderation.noIdFound: No ID found — use debug view to inspect the raw data
Moderation.notSupportedDescription: Approving via the API is not possible for your account. Use the Kiyoh dashboard.

ReviewDisable.title: Manually disable review

Automation.title: Automation Workflows
Automation.subtitle: Train the agent by recording step-by-step workflows. The agent follows exactly the steps you set.
Automation.safetyNotice: Deterministic & Safe: The agent only executes the exact CSS selectors you define here. Use Dry Run to test without modifying anything on Kiyoh/KV.
Automation.noWorkflowsDescription: Create your first workflow to get started
Automation.name: Name
Automation.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this workflow?
Automation.variablesNotice: Runtime Variables: Use {{username}} and {{password}} for login credentials (automatically filled from railway environment). Use {{reviewId}} for the review ID you fill in when executing.

ReviewDisableEmail.subject: Update on your review — proof of purchase rejected
ReviewDisableEmail.intro: We are writing to let you know that your review has unfortunately been removed. The proof of purchase you uploaded was rejected because it did not meet our criteria, so the review no longer complies with our {guidelinesLink}.
ReviewDisableEmail.requirementsIntro: For us to verify a review, a valid proof of purchase must clearly include:
ReviewDisableEmail.requirementCompanyName: A clear mention of the company name.
ReviewDisableEmail.requirementDate: The date of purchase, delivery, or order.
ReviewDisableEmail.requirementOrderNumber: An order number, invoice number, or reference number.
ReviewDisableEmail.requirementCustomerName: Your name (matching the name used on the review).
ReviewDisableEmail.disputePrompt: Disagree with this decision or have the correct document on hand? Tap the button below to dispute and upload a valid proof of purchase.
ReviewDisableEmail.failureNotAReceipt: The uploaded image was not a valid receipt
ReviewDisableEmail.failureImageUnclear: The receipt image was too unclear to verify
ReviewDisableEmail.failureInsufficientInfo: The receipt did not contain sufficient information
ReviewDisableEmail.failureDuplicateReceipt: This receipt has already been submitted
ReviewDisableEmail.failureReceiptTooOld: The receipt is too old to be accepted
ReviewDisableEmail.failureSuspectedFraud: The receipt was flagged for suspected fraud
ReviewDisableEmail.failureUnreadableText: The text on the receipt could not be read
ReviewDisableEmail.failureMissingKeyFields: The receipt was missing required information
ReviewDisableEmail.failureAdminDisabled: An administrator has disabled this review
ReviewDisableEmail.failureVerificationFailed: The receipt did not pass verification

Dispute.title: Dispute a Rejected Review
Dispute.intro: Upload your purchase receipt to verify your review. We will run an instant check and let you know the result.
Dispute.missingReviewId: We could not find a review ID. Open the dispute link from your email again, or request a human review after uploading.
Dispute.instructionsTitle: How to take a good photo
Dispute.instructionPhoto: Use the original receipt — no edited screenshots.
Dispute.instructionFlat: Lay it flat in good lighting so the whole receipt is visible.
Dispute.instructionDate: The shop name, date, and total amount must be readable.
Dispute.instructionFormat: Accepted formats: JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP, or PDF.
Dispute.dropzonePrimary: Click to upload or drag and drop
Dispute.dropzoneSecondary: JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP, or PDF up to 25 MB
Dispute.verifiedDescription: Your receipt passed verification and has been added to your review.
Dispute.rejectedDescription: We could not verify this receipt. You can try again with a clearer photo, or request a human review.
Dispute.reviewRequestedDescription: A team member will look into this and get back to you.
Dispute.uploadUrlFailed: Could not get an upload URL
Dispute.genericError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
Dispute.invalidLinkBody: Open the link from your latest disable email, or contact support if you keep seeing this.
Dispute.invalidLinkMissing: This dispute link is missing required information.
